overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, showing a nighttime walk through a foggy futuristic city with heavy neon lighting. The player character walks along wet streets, crosses intersections, and passes through dense urban corridors with towering digital billboards and flying vehicles overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy sidewalk with teal neon commercial frontage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk past teal-lit storefronts with Japanese signage

entered.detail: overhead teal fluorescent lights lining the building facade
illuminated sign with Japanese characters indicating business is open
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow foggy sidewalk next to a building with prominent teal neon lighting and Japanese signage. The street is wet with reflections, and a few pedestrians approach from the opposite direction. Parked cars line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: Grant Ave intersection with traffic control and seating area

events.description: approaching Grant Ave intersection with overhead traffic gantry and crosswalk
traffic light changes to green, preparing to cross the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, turning to face the crosswalk, and beginning to cross the street

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench against the building wall

entered.detail: red illuminated street sign reading 'Grant Ave' suspended over the intersection
large overhead structure supporting traffic lights and street signs
metal bench with two seated figures against the building
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the Grant Ave intersection with a large overhead traffic gantry. The camera turns right to face the crosswalk, passing a bench with seated occupants. The traffic light changes to green as the camera prepares to cross the wide intersection with yellow zebra stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection crossing with floating traffic and towering billboards

events.description: stepping onto the wide crosswalk with prominent yellow stripes
entering denser fog with floating vehicles visible overhead against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection toward the dense neon-lit downtown district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket crossing the street ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: futuristic flying cars hovering in the distance above the intersection
tall digital advertising towers with illuminated displays
buildings with prominent pink and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection with bold yellow crosswalk stripes, surrounded by thick fog. Floating vehicles hover overhead while large vertical billboards and pink neon structures become visible in the distance. A pedestrian in a blue jacket walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon commercial corridor with large digital billboards

events.description: entering dense neon district with heavy pink and cyan lighting and towering advertisements
passing behind a pedestrian with blue hair who is walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit sidewalk passing digital billboards and other pedestrians in a dense commercial area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive blue hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: street sign indicating '2nd Street' with illuminated text
massive digital billboard displaying a stylized face advertisement
futuristic building entrance with curved pink neon lighting
blue garbage bags piled near a construction barrier

segments.scene_description: Entering a dense neon commercial corridor with heavy pink and cyan lighting. Large digital billboards including one with a stylized face dominate the left side, while a futuristic building with pink neon arches lines the right. The camera follows a pedestrian with blue hair through the moderately crowded sidewalk, passing trash bags and construction barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, foggy sidewalk into a sprawling, neon-drenched commercial corridor. It begins by moving past teal neon signage and parked cars on a wet street, where the reflections of Japanese characters shimmer on the pavement. As the path opens into the Grant Ave intersection, the camera turns right past a public bench and waits for the traffic light to turn green before stepping onto bold yellow zebra stripes. The scene then expands across the wide, fog-shrouded crossing under hovering vehicles, shifting focus toward distant pink neon structures and towering vertical billboards. Finally, the camera enters a dense urban canyon dominated by cyan and pink lighting, following a blue-haired pedestrian past massive digital displays and futuristic arches into a crowded commercial district.
